case_title: CHANG SUN et al. VS. TRAVEL DESIGN USA, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-02-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVEL DESIGN USA, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $379.00 FILED BY SUN, CHANG SUN, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVEL DESIGN USA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-12-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS CHANG SUN & JULIE SUN, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE CRAIG HSU, VICE PRESIDENT OF TRAVEL DESIGN USA, INC. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. MR. HSU AGREED TO ASSIST PLAINTIFFS CHANG & JULIE SUN WITH FILING A CLAIM FOR THEIR CANCELLED EXCURSION. THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE ON 12/12/16. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS CHANG SUN AND JULIE SUN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TRAVEL DESIGN USA, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE CRAIG HSU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, CHANG SUN, JULIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRAVEL DESIGN USA, INC. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRAVEL DESIGN USA, INC.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SUN, CHANG
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUN, CHANG SUN, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVEL DESIGN USA, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY SUN, CHANG SUN, JULIE TRAVEL DESIGN USA, INC.
